zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Stephens於大約1562年出生在英國維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯時，他的父親Richardi Stephens44歲，母親Dorothy Saunders23歲。他於1586年與Joanna Avery在英國英格蘭維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1623年11月16日在英國英格蘭維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾比曉普也斯 卡寧斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Stephens于大约1562年出生在英国維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯时，他的父亲Richardi Stephens44岁，母亲Dorothy Saunders23岁。他于1586年与Joanna Avery在英国英格兰維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1623年11月16日在英国英格兰維爾爾比曉普斯 卡寧斯享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾比曉普也斯 卡寧斯。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Stephens was born about 1562, in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, his father, Richardi Stephens, was 44 and his mother, Dorothy Saunders, was 23. He married Joanna Avery in 1586, in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 16 November 1623, in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Bishop's Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Stephens est né environ 1562, à Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richardi Stephens, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Saunders, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Avery en 1586, à Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1623, à Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Bishop's Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Stephens um 1562 in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richardi Stephens 44 und seine Mutter Dorothy Saunders 23. Er hat 1586 in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Joanna Avery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 16. November 1623 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bishop's Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Stephens è nato il circa 1562 nel Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Richardi Stephens, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Saunders, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Avery nel 1586, nel Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 16 novembre 1623, nel Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishop's Cannings, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Stephensが約1562年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプス カニングズで生まれた時，父Richardi Stephensは44歳，母Dorothy Saundersは23歳であった。1586年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプス カニングズでJoanna Averyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1623年11月16日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプス カニングズで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアビショプ'ス カニングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Stephens(이)가 대략 1562년 영국 윌츠히르 비숍스 캔잉스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richardi Stephens(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Saunders(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1586년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 비숍스 캔잉스에서 Joanna Avery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1623년 11월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 비숍스 캔잉스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 비숍'스 캔잉스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Stephens nasceu aproximadamente 1562, em Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richardi Stephens, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Saunders, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Avery em 1586, em Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1623, em Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishop's Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Stephens родился около 1562 г. в местности бишопс каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richardi Stephens было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Saunders, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Avery в 1586 г. в местности бишопс каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 16 ноября 1623 г. в местности бишопс каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности бишоп'с каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Stephens nació aproximadamente 1562, en Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richardi Stephens, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Dorothy Saunders, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joanna Avery en 1586, en Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1623, en Bishops Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Bishop's Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
